slides.title: Best for *newer* lifters
slides.body: Recomp works fastest when you're new or returning.

slides.title: Eat at *maintenance*
slides.body: Around maintenance calories, not a big deficit.

slides.title: Protein stays *high*
slides.body: 1g per pound drives the muscle gain.

slides.title: Train *hard*
slides.body: Progressive overload tells your body to build.

slides.title: It's *slow*
slides.body: Recomp is gradual. Judge it over months.

slides.title: Recomp *smart*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your calories, protein and training together.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store
